name: superteam
description: Build with a team of agents using Superpowers

interface.shortDescription: Build with a team of agents using Superpowers
interface.longDescription: Move a GitHub issue to a testable, demoable outcome as quickly as possible through brainstorm, plan, execute, review, and CI follow-through.
defaultPrompt: Use $superteam to take issue #1 from design through review-ready execution.
Use $superteam to coordinate a multi-agent implementation plan for this issue.
Use $superteam to resume an issue workflow from planning or execution.
